title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises:
Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises!
